problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: Combining CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
